message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam note {
  BackgroundColor #FFFFE0
  BorderColor #CCCCCC
  FontColor #333333
  FontSize 12
}
skinparam participant {
  BackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  BorderColor #9370DB
  FontColor #000000
  FontSize 14
}
skinparam lifeline {
  BorderColor #9370DB
}
skinparam arrow {
  Color #000000
  Thickness 1
}

participant "AbstractApplicationContext" as A
participant "GenericApplicationContext" as G
participant "ApplicationContextAwareProcessor" as P
participant "AbstractAutowireCapableBeanFactory" as B
participant "DefaultListableBeanFactory" as D

note over A: 以下流程都在refresh()方法内部

note over A: 第1步
A->A: 1 prepareRefresh
A->A: initPropertySources()
note left of A: 空方法,留给子类重写
A->A: getEnvironment()
A->A: validateRequiredProperties()
A->A: new LinkedHashSet<>()
note left of A: 泛型ApplicationEvent

note over A: 第2步
A->A: 2 obtainFreshBeanFactory()
A->G: refreshBeanFactory()
G->D: new DefaultListableBeanFactory()
D->D: setSerializationId(getId())
G-->A: 未定义变量接收返回值
A->G: getBeanFactory
G-->A: 返回 DefaultListableBeanFactory

note over A: 第3步
A->A: 3 prepareBeanFactory
note over A: 设置BeanFactory的类加载器、支持表达式解析器

note over A: 添加Bean后置处理器 例如
A->P: addBeanPostProcessor(new ApplicationContextAwareProcessor(this))
P->P: 构造器
P-->A: 返回 ApplicationContextAwareProcessor

note over A: 设置忽略的自动装配的接口 例如
A->B: ignoreDependencyInterface(ApplicationEventPublisherAware.class)
B->B: ignoredDependencyInterfaces.add(ifo)
B-->A: 未定义变量接收返回值

note over A: 注册可以解析的自动装配 例如
A->D: registerResolvableDependency(BeanFactory.class, beanFactory)
D->D: resolvableDependencies.put();
note left of D: params { dependencyType, autowiredValue }
D-->A: 未定义变量接收返回值

note over A: 添加ApplicationListenerDetector的Bean后置处理器
note over A: 添加编译时的AspectJ
note over A: 给BeanFactory中注册一些能用的组件
A->D: registerSingleton(ENVIRONMENT_BEAN_NAME / SYSTEM_PROPERTIES_BEAN_NAME / SYSTEM_ENVIRONMENT_BEAN_NAME)
D->D: addSingleton();
note left of D: params{beanName, singletonObject}
D-->A: 未定义变量接收返回值

note over A: 第4步
note over A: 在应用程序上下文的标准初始化之后修改其内部bean工厂
A->A: postProcessBeanFactory(beanFactory);
note left of A: 空方法 留给子类重写

@enduml
```
